free_text: The study of (d,t) and (d,3He) reactions in several

The 13C target was prepared depositing a fine
suspension of 90% 13C isotope on a metallic backing.
The 14N and 16O data were obtained by using 2.5 cm diam
cylindrical gas cell having entrance and exit windows
of 1.9 mg/cm2 Havar foil to contain approximately 1 atm
deltaE detectors and 1000 um E-detectors when
measurements of 3He and triton groups were made
simultaneously, and 50 um (20 um) delta-E detectors
were used when it was possible to detect only
The particles were sorted and stored using a
mass-identification program in an on - line computer
